name: Nebular Lute
description: Notes This lute provides solid defensive stats and the biggest party boost to DEF on use of any lute, with a whopping +8 DEF for 5.5 seconds. This makes it a great all-around lute to use to make both yourself and your group incredibly tanky.
effects: Party Effect: Within 4.5 squares Inspired for 6.5 seconds, DEF Boost (+8 DEF) for 5.5 seconds
